Table rules: Add the missing using directive for Aspose.Words.Tables to access the Table class.
Range rules: When using a custom IReplacingCallback, the replacement string passed to Range.Replace is ignored; you must return ReplaceAction.Skip after handling the replacement yourself.
Loading rules: Cast args.MatchNode.Document (DocumentBase) to Document before creating new nodes.
Images/Shapes/OLE rules: Ensure the placeholder regex pattern is escaped correctly ("\\[SHAPE\\]").
